commands.repair_reason: The remaining blocker is contributor-supplied real behavior proof and PR-body cleanup, not an automated code repair.; Cleared: Cleared: the diff adds no dependency, workflow, network, permission, or command-execution surface, and persists only a short hash prefix rather than raw token bytes. (sha=2a79962c11daac6d15525f8867fdb7b2385ad313)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Telegram bot-token fingerprinting to long-poll offset state, resets stale or legacy offsets during monitor startup, logs and deletes stale offset files, and adds focused offset-store tests.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main stores only botId plus lastUpdateId and passes that value into the tracker, which skips updates at or below the restored watermark. I did not run a live BotFather rotation path in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: The remaining blocker is contributor-supplied real behavior proof and PR-body cleanup, not an automated code repair.
